% check a.php
a.php:10:2: $e is of type: FooException|Exception (DEBUG)

% check b.php
b.php:4:10: class UnknownException not found

-- a.php --
<?php

class FooException extends \Exception
{
}

try {
} catch (\FooException | Exception $e) {
	echo $e->getMessage();
	#debugType $e
}
-- b.php --
<?php

try {
} catch (\UnknownException $e) {
}
